root_text.an2.98:1.3: Yo ca anāgataṁ bhāraṁ vahati, yo ca āgataṁ bhāraṁ na vahati.
root_text.an2.99:1.3: Yo ca anāgataṁ bhāraṁ na vahati, yo ca āgataṁ bhāraṁ vahati.
root_text.an2.100:1.3: Yo ca akappiye kappiyasaññī, yo ca kappiye akappiyasaññī.
root_text.an2.101:1.3: Yo ca akappiye akappiyasaññī, yo ca kappiye kappiyasaññī.
root_text.an2.102:1.3: Yo ca anāpattiyā āpattisaññī, yo ca āpattiyā anāpattisaññī.
root_text.an2.103:1.3: Yo ca anāpattiyā anāpattisaññī, yo ca āpattiyā āpattisaññī.
root_text.an2.104:1.3: Yo ca adhamme dhammasaññī, yo ca dhamme adhammasaññī.
root_text.an2.105:1.3: Yo ca dhamme dhammasaññī, yo ca adhamme adhammasaññī.
root_text.an2.106:1.3: Yo ca avinaye vinayasaññī, yo ca vinaye avinayasaññī.
root_text.an2.107:1.3: Yo ca avinaye avinayasaññī, yo ca vinaye vinayasaññī.
root_text.an2.108:1.3: Yo ca na kukkuccāyitabbaṁ kukkuccāyati, yo ca kukkuccāyitabbaṁ na kukkuccāyati.
root_text.an2.108:1.4: Imesaṁ kho, bhikkhave, dvinnaṁ āsavā vaḍḍhantī”ti.
root_text.an2.109:1.3: Yo ca na kukkuccāyitabbaṁ na kukkuccāyati, yo ca kukkuccāyitabbaṁ kukkuccāyati.
root_text.an2.109:1.4: Imesaṁ kho, bhikkhave, dvinnaṁ āsavā na vaḍḍhantī”ti.
root_text.an2.110:1.3: Yo ca akappiye kappiyasaññī, yo ca kappiye akappiyasaññī.
root_text.an2.110:1.4: Imesaṁ kho, bhikkhave, dvinnaṁ āsavā vaḍḍhantī”ti.
root_text.an2.111:1.3: Yo ca akappiye akappiyasaññī, yo ca kappiye kappiyasaññī.
root_text.an2.111:1.4: Imesaṁ kho, bhikkhave, dvinnaṁ āsavā na vaḍḍhantī”ti.
root_text.an2.112:1.3: Yo ca āpattiyā anāpattisaññī, yo ca anāpattiyā āpattisaññī.
root_text.an2.112:1.4: Imesaṁ kho, bhikkhave, dvinnaṁ āsavā vaḍḍhantī”ti.
root_text.an2.113:1.3: Yo ca āpattiyā āpattisaññī, yo ca anāpattiyā anāpattisaññī.
root_text.an2.113:1.4: Imesaṁ kho, bhikkhave, dvinnaṁ āsavā na vaḍḍhantī”ti.
root_text.an2.114:1.3: Yo ca adhamme dhammasaññī, yo ca dhamme adhammasaññī.
root_text.an2.114:1.4: Imesaṁ kho, bhikkhave, dvinnaṁ āsavā vaḍḍhantī”ti.
root_text.an2.115:1.3: Yo ca dhamme dhammasaññī, yo ca adhamme adhammasaññī.
root_text.an2.115:1.4: Imesaṁ kho, bhikkhave, dvinnaṁ āsavā na vaḍḍhantī”ti.
root_text.an2.116:1.3: Yo ca avinaye vinayasaññī, yo ca vinaye avinayasaññī.
root_text.an2.116:1.4: Imesaṁ kho, bhikkhave, dvinnaṁ āsavā vaḍḍhantī”ti.
root_text.an2.117:1.3: Yo ca avinaye avinayasaññī, yo ca vinaye vinayasaññī.
root_text.an2.117:1.4: Imesaṁ kho, bhikkhave, dvinnaṁ āsavā na vaḍḍhantī”ti.

translation_text.an2.98:1.3: One who carries the burden of what has not come to pass, and one who doesn’t carry the burden of what has come to pass.
translation_text.an2.99:1.3: One who doesn’t carry the burden of what has not come to pass, and one who carries the burden of what has come to pass.
translation_text.an2.99:1.4: These are the two who are astute.”
translation_text.an2.100:1.3: One who perceives what is unallowable as allowable, and one who perceives what is allowable as unallowable.
translation_text.an2.101:1.3: One who perceives what is unallowable as unallowable, and one who perceives what is allowable as allowable.
translation_text.an2.101:1.4: These are the two who are astute.”
translation_text.an2.102:1.3: One who perceives a non-offense as an offense, and one who perceives an offense as a non-offense.
translation_text.an2.103:1.3: One who perceives a non-offense as a non-offense, and one who perceives an offense as an offense.
translation_text.an2.103:1.4: These are the two who are astute.”
translation_text.an2.104:1.3: One who perceives what is not the teaching as the teaching, and one who perceives the teaching as not the teaching.
translation_text.an2.105:1.3: One who perceives the teaching as the teaching, and one who perceives what is not the teaching as not the teaching.
translation_text.an2.105:1.4: These are the two who are astute.”
translation_text.an2.106:1.3: One who perceives what is not the training as the training, and one who perceives what is the training as not the training.
translation_text.an2.107:1.3: One who perceives what is not the training as not the training, and one who perceives what is the training as the training.
translation_text.an2.107:1.4: These are the two who are astute.”
translation_text.an2.108:1.3: One who is remorseful over something they shouldn’t be, and one who isn’t remorseful over something they should be.
translation_text.an2.108:1.4: These are the two whose defilements grow.”
translation_text.an2.109:1.3: One who isn’t remorseful over something they shouldn’t be, and one who is remorseful over something they should be.
translation_text.an2.109:1.4: These are the two whose defilements don’t grow.”
translation_text.an2.110:1.3: One who perceives what is unallowable as allowable, and one who perceives what is allowable as unallowable.
translation_text.an2.110:1.4: These are the two whose defilements grow.”
translation_text.an2.111:1.3: One who perceives what is unallowable as unallowable, and one who perceives what is allowable as allowable.
translation_text.an2.111:1.4: These are the two whose defilements don’t grow.”
translation_text.an2.112:1.3: One who perceives an offense as a non-offense, and one who perceives a non-offense as an offense.
translation_text.an2.112:1.4: These are the two whose defilements grow.”
translation_text.an2.113:1.3: One who perceives an offense as an offense, and one who perceives a non-offense as a non-offense.
translation_text.an2.113:1.4: These are the two whose defilements don’t grow.”
translation_text.an2.114:1.3: One who perceives what is not the teaching as the teaching, and one who perceives the teaching as not the teaching.
translation_text.an2.114:1.4: These are the two whose defilements grow.”
translation_text.an2.115:1.3: One who perceives the teaching as the teaching, and one who perceives what is not the teaching as not the teaching.
translation_text.an2.115:1.4: These are the two whose defilements don’t grow.”
translation_text.an2.116:1.3: One who perceives what is not the training as the training, and one who perceives what is the training as not the training.
translation_text.an2.116:1.4: These are the two whose defilements grow.”
translation_text.an2.117:1.3: One who perceives what is not the training as not the training, and one who perceives what is the training as the training.
translation_text.an2.117:1.4: These are the two whose defilements don’t grow.”
